summary: Backend + frontend testing complete for iter_jan2026 beta-feedback + HungryVibes sponsorship + Pinochle AAA. 9/10 backend tests pass; 6/6 frontend flows pass. Feedback round-trip verified end-to-end (user → admin inbox). Pinochle AAA lobby + game room + bidding render. Existing flows (demo login, games-menu, vault admin) unchanged. ONE backend bug: /sponsorship/verify returns 500 instead of 400 on invalid session_id.

minor.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error when session_id is invalid/malformed. The Stripe SDK's get_checkout_status raises an uncaught exception. Spec (and iteration task #2) says this must return 400.
minor.fix: Wrap the get_checkout_status call in try/except and raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail='Invalid session') on failure. File: /app/backend/routes/hungryvibes_merchant.py line ~628.

action_items: Wrap the Stripe get_checkout_status call in /app/backend/routes/hungryvibes_merchant.py `/sponsorship/verify` in try/except → raise HTTPException(400) so invalid session_ids don't 500. Otherwise everything else is green.

(optional polish) TestAAAGameRoutesRegression: /api/crazy-eights/start returned 404 — route path may differ from the pinochle-practice / spades-practice convention. Confirm the real path (e.g. /api/crazy-eights-practice/start or /api/card-royale/...) and update if needed. Not a regression of this iteration.
critical_code_review_comments: hungryvibes_merchant.py sponsorship/verify: missing try/except around Stripe API call — any Stripe SDK exception bubbles to 500. Add narrow except + log + 400 response.

florida_flow.py submit_feedback: uses res.inserted_id.str() for feedback_id which is a Mongo ObjectId — this IS leaked in the POST response. Harmless but inconsistent with the project's 'never leak _id' convention. Consider returning a uuid4() instead.

pinochle_practice.py uses an in-memory _MATCHES dict keyed by user_id — any process restart loses all active games. Acceptable for a practice-mode MVP but document it or move to Mongo before multiplayer.
test_credentials: Demo login via data-testid='login-demo-btn'. Vault admin: password 'GlobalVibez_Founder_2025!' + any 6-digit code (field name is 'code', not 'totp_code').
seed_data_creation: Inserted 2 beta_feedback rows + 1 hv_merchants doc (name='TEST_iter_merchant'). Safe to leave — data is prefixed TEST_ and visible in vault admin for manual verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend bug fix is a ~5 line change. After fix, re-run `pytest tests/test_iter_jan2026_beta_stripe_pinochle.py::TestHungryVibesSponsorship -v` — should go 2/2 green. UI was fully verified incl. vault admin tab (screenshot captured shows 4 beta-feedback items + filters + severity counters rendering correctly). Pinochle AAA lobby + start button + game room all render. No regression on spades/hearts AAA / games-menu / demo login. Privy 'e is not a function' + WebSocket warnings are pre-existing noise, not this iteration.
rca of the issue: /sponsorship/verify: the handler calls `await stripe_checkout.get_checkout_status(session_id)` with no try/except. When Stripe rejects the session_id, emergentintegrations raises a ValueError/HTTPError which FastAPI renders as 500. Reproduction: POST /api/hungryvibes/merchant/sponsorship/verify {"session_id":"cs_test_invalid_fake_id"} with a valid Bearer token and an existing merchant → 500 Internal Server Error. Fix: wrap the call + return HTTPException(400, 'Invalid or expired session').
